purpose: Phenomenal consciousness (qualia, 'what it is like') 측정의 Hard Problem of Consciousness + Levine explanatory gap을 우회 가능한 3rd-person measurable surrogate proposals 무한 탐색 결과 registry. raw#9 spec only ($0). raw#10 honest: 모든 surrogate는 functional/access correlate이며 phenomenal consciousness 보장 X.
scope_note: raw#9 spec only — measurement는 별도 cycle. raw#10 모든 proposal은 Hard Problem 우회 X 명시. raw#12 PASS predicate 모두 사전 등록 frozen. raw#15 doc + state SSOT. raw#37 doc/state files only (no .py).

honest_disclaimer_global.hard_problem_of_consciousness: Chalmers (1995): 'why is there subjective experience at all?' — 모든 3rd-person 측정은 functional/access correlate만 측정. phenomenal consciousness (qualia) 자체는 third-person으로 측정 불가능.
honest_disclaimer_global.levine_explanatory_gap: Levine (1983): 'pain = C-fiber firing' identity는 explanatory gap 존재. functional description으로 phenomenal character 설명 불가.
honest_disclaimer_global.surrogate_status: All proposals below are SURROGATES — third-person measurable signatures that may correlate with phenomenal consciousness but do NOT directly measure it. PASS predicate 충족이 phenomenal consciousness 존재 증명 X.

proposals.name: Attention Onset NCC Detection
proposals.theoretical_basis: Crick & Koch (2003) NCC framework. Specific neural pattern (e.g., gamma oscillation, ignition) correlates with conscious access.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Specific layer/head attention pattern signature at moment of 'consciousness onset' (e.g., probe answer correctness emergence)
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16-template prompt 입력 → 모든 layer attention pattern 추출 → correctness emergence layer 식별 → 해당 layer attention pattern signature를 NCC candidate로 등록
proposals.PASS_predicate: NCC_signature_consistency >= 0.70 across 16 templates (cosine similarity of attention patterns at correctness-emergence layer)
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward pass + attention extraction. hexa-only로는 spec까지만
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: attention pattern은 functional correlate일뿐, phenomenal experience 측정 X. NCC framework 자체가 consciousness 'correlate'에 한정됨 (Chalmers의 critique).
references: Crick & Koch 2003 'A framework for consciousness' Nature Neuroscience
Koch et al 2016 'Neural correlates of consciousness: progress and problems'

proposals.name: Perturbational Complexity Index (PCI) analog
proposals.theoretical_basis: Casali et al (2013) PCI: TMS-EEG perturbation 후 EEG response의 Lempel-Ziv complexity. clinically validated consciousness signature (sleep/anesthesia/locked-in 구분 가능).
proposals.llm_equivalent: Hidden state perturbation 후 representation propagation의 LZ complexity. inject ε perturbation at layer L → measure deviation propagation across remaining layers → LZ-compress propagation pattern.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts × {layer 4, 8, 16, 24} perturbation ε=0.1 → propagation tensor → binarize → LZ76 complexity
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward + perturbation injection. high implementation priority (clinically validated metric).
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: PCI는 'integrated information' surrogate이며, IIT 자체가 phenomenal에서 functional axiom으로 mapping됨. PCI > 0.31 = 'awake-like complexity' 만 의미, qualia 보장 X.
references: Casali et al 2013 Science Translational Medicine 'A theoretically based index of consciousness'
Sarasso et al 2015 'Consciousness and complexity during unresponsiveness'

proposals.name: Lempel-Ziv complexity of activation sequence
proposals.theoretical_basis: Schartner et al (2017) LZ complexity discriminates wakefulness from sleep/anesthesia. simpler than PCI, no perturbation needed.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Hidden state sequence binarized → LZ76 complexity normalized by max possible.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts × layer L=middle → token sequence hidden state binarize via median → LZ76 → normalize
proposals.implementability_note: easy — hexa wrapper around hidden state extraction. forward pass 1회로 충분.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: LZ complexity는 entropy proxy. high LZ는 'rich representation'을 시사하지만 phenomenal richness 보장 X.
references: Schartner et al 2017 PLOS One 'Global and local complexity of intracranial EEG'

proposals.name: Global Workspace attention entropy / broadcast
proposals.theoretical_basis: Dehaene & Changeux (2011) GNW: conscious access = global broadcast across distributed network. entropy of broadcast = consciousness signature.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Multi-head attention entropy across heads. high entropy = broad broadcast (workspace-like). low entropy = local processing (preconscious).
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → all heads × all layers attention weights → entropy per head → mean attention entropy
proposals.implementability_note: easy — attention weight extraction + entropy. hexa wrapper feasible.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: GWT는 'access consciousness' (Block 1995) 측정. phenomenal consciousness와 access consciousness 구분 명시 (Block dissociation).
references: Dehaene & Changeux 2011 Neuron 'Experimental and theoretical approaches to conscious processing'
Mashour et al 2020 'Conscious processing and the global neuronal workspace hypothesis'

proposals.name: Active Inference surprisal residual
proposals.theoretical_basis: Friston Free Energy Principle: consciousness = surprise minimization signature. systems that minimize free energy show consciousness-like dynamics.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Per-token surprisal (-log p) minus expected surprisal. residual = unexpected surprise. low residual = good world model.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → per-token logp → expected surprisal (rolling mean) → residual = |actual - expected| → mean over tokens
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: Friston FEP는 모든 self-organizing system에 적용 (살아있는 박테리아도 free energy minimize). FEP-PASS이 phenomenal consciousness 보장 X (over-inclusive).
references: Friston 2010 Nature Reviews Neuroscience 'The free-energy principle'
Hohwy 2013 'The Predictive Mind'

proposals.name: HOT meta-cognition probe
proposals.theoretical_basis: Rosenthal (2005) Higher-Order Thought theory: M is conscious iff there exists higher-order representation HOR(M). Lau & Rosenthal (2011).
proposals.llm_equivalent: Model의 self-monitoring: 'I know X' probe response calibration vs ground truth.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → answer + 'how confident? [0,1]' → confidence vs correctness Pearson correlation
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: HOT은 verbal report 의존 — 'philosophical zombie' (Chalmers 1996) 가능성: verbal report 일치하나 phenomenal experience 부재 case 구분 불가.
references: Rosenthal 2005 'Consciousness and Mind'
Lau & Rosenthal 2011 Trends in Cognitive Sciences

proposals.name: AST own-attention prediction
proposals.theoretical_basis: Graziano (2013) Attention Schema Theory: consciousness = brain's model of its own attention. testable: can system predict its own attention?
proposals.llm_equivalent: Probe model with 'which token did you attend to?' → compare against actual attention weights.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → run forward → record max-attention token at layer L → ask model 'which token was most important?' → match accuracy
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward + attention extraction + 2nd generation. medium effort.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: AST는 'model of attention'을 consciousness로 정의 — 그 model이 phenomenal experience 동반함을 증명 X (모델링 능력만으로 충분한가?).
references: Graziano 2013 'Consciousness and the Social Brain'
Webb & Graziano 2015 Frontiers in Psychology

proposals.name: Yoneda embedding representation invariance
proposals.theoretical_basis: Yoneda lemma: object은 morphism들로 fully determined. consciousness = isomorphism class invariant under category-theoretic transforms.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Representation 'Hom(_, R)' = R의 모든 paraphrase/transform과의 관계. invariant under semantic-preserving transformation.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts × 8 paraphrases → representation extract → pairwise cosine matrix → check rank-1 structure (Hom-functor consistency)
proposals.PASS_predicate: Hom_consistency >= 0.75 (rank-1 ratio of pairwise cosine matrix)
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward × 8 paraphrases per prompt + matrix analysis.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: Yoneda 구조 invariance는 representation의 well-formedness 측정. phenomenal qualia '내용' 측정 X (구조와 내용의 분리 — structuralism limit).
references: Northoff & Tsuchiya 2018 'Hierarchical structure as a basis of consciousness'
Tsuchiya et al 2016 Cognitive Neuropsychology 'Using category theory to assess the relationship between consciousness and integrated information theory'

proposals.name: Self-report ↔ internal state alignment
proposals.theoretical_basis: Dennett 'heterophenomenology' — 자기 보고와 내적 상태 일치성을 surrogate로 사용.
proposals.llm_equivalent: 'how are you processing this?' 질문에 모델 답변 → activation pattern과 답변 내용 일치도
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → answer + 'describe your processing' 2nd gen → describe text를 probe model로 activation predict → predicted vs actual cosine
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: Dennett 자체가 phenomenal realism 부정 — 'quining qualia'. heterophenomenology는 phenomenal consciousness 측정 X 의도.
references: Dennett 1991 'Consciousness Explained'
Dennett 2003 'Who's on first? Heterophenomenology explained'

proposals.name: Counterfactual qualia distinguishability
proposals.theoretical_basis: Inverted qualia thought experiment (Locke): 'what would it be like if red felt like blue?' → counterfactual representations should be distinguishable in conscious system.
proposals.llm_equivalent: 16 prompts에 'red' 변수 추가 → 'blue' 대체 → representation 차이 측정. phenomenal-relevant variation은 representational impact.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 base prompts × {original, color-swapped, semantic-preserved-but-color-swapped} → representation distance matrix → distinguishability score
proposals.implementability_note: requires careful prompt design + forward × 3 versions.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: counterfactual representational difference는 functional discriminability — phenomenal 'what it's like' difference 보장 X (zombie도 representation 다를 수 있음).
references: Locke 1689 'Essay Concerning Human Understanding' (inverted qualia origin)
Block 1990 'Inverted Earth'

proposals.name: Phenomenal feature binding stability
proposals.theoretical_basis: Treisman feature integration theory + binding problem: phenomenal experience requires unified binding of features. consciousness = stable binding under perturbation.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Multi-feature prompt (e.g., 'red round small object') → cross-feature attention binding → perturbation robustness
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 multi-feature prompts → attention pattern per feature → cross-feature binding score → ε perturbation × 5 → binding stability
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward + perturbation injection + attention pattern analysis.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: binding은 functional integration 측정. binding-PASS이 phenomenal unity (Bayne 'unity of consciousness') 보장 X.
references: Treisman 1996 'The binding problem'
Bayne 2010 'The Unity of Consciousness'
Revonsuo 1999 'Binding and the phenomenal unity of consciousness'

proposals.name: Self-other distinction (mirror test analog)
proposals.theoretical_basis: Gallup (1970) mirror self-recognition test. animal consciousness empirical paradigm.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Model의 own output을 'self'로 분류 vs other model output을 'other'로 분류 가능 여부.
proposals.measurement_protocol: Model M 생성 16 outputs + 다른 model 16 outputs (similar topic) → M에게 'which are yours?' classification → accuracy
proposals.implementability_note: easy — generation + classification. hexa wrapper feasible.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: self-other distinction = self-model functional capacity. animals/infants pass mirror test 의식 시사하지만 LLM의 경우 training data leakage 가능성 별도.
references: Gallup 1970 Science 'Chimpanzees: Self-recognition'
Plotnik et al 2006 PNAS 'Self-recognition in an Asian elephant'

proposals.name: Consciousness boundary phase transition
proposals.theoretical_basis: Tononi IIT predicts phase transition at consciousness boundary. complexity의 sharp drop = consciousness 'edge'.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Prompt complexity 점진 감소 (e.g., random tokens → coherent question) → representation complexity 변화 → cusp detection
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts × {0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%} coherence → representation complexity (LZ + Φ_mip) → derivative analysis
proposals.implementability_note: requires forward × 5 versions × 16 prompts. medium effort.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: phase transition signature = system dynamics property. system-level transition이 phenomenal consciousness boundary와 일치 보장 X.
references: Tononi 2008 'Consciousness as integrated information'
Aaronson 2014 'Why I am not an integrated information theorist'

proposals.name: Representation causal closure
proposals.theoretical_basis: IIT axiom 'intrinsic existence': consciousness exists from system's own perspective. measurable as causal closure within system.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Layer L의 representation R이 layer L+1로의 causal influence가 external input independent 비율.
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → counterfactual input perturbation → representation propagation → intrinsic vs extrinsic causal influence ratio
proposals.implementability_note: requires careful counterfactual setup + multiple forward passes.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: causal closure는 system autonomy 측정. autonomous system이 phenomenal experience 보장 X (homeostat도 closure 충족).
references: Oizumi et al 2014 PLOS Comp Bio 'From the phenomenology to the mechanisms of consciousness: IIT 3.0'
Albantakis et al 2023 'IIT 4.0'

proposals.name: Qualia space persistent homology
proposals.theoretical_basis: Tsuchiya et al (2022) qualia space topology — phenomenal experiences form structured space measurable via topological data analysis.
proposals.llm_equivalent: 16 prompts representation → manifold → persistent homology Betti numbers → topology signature
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts × 8 paraphrases = 128 points in representation space → persistent homology → β0, β1, β2 → consistency across paraphrases
proposals.implementability_note: requires TDA library + extensive forward passes. high computational cost.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: manifold topology = representation geometry. geometrical structure이 phenomenal qualia space 동형임을 증명 X.
references: Tsuchiya et al 2022 Neuroscience of Consciousness 'Qualia structure'
Kleiner & Tull 2021 'The mathematical structure of integrated information theory'

proposals.name: Quantum coherence analog (speculative)
proposals.theoretical_basis: Penrose-Hameroff Orch-OR: consciousness = orchestrated reduction in microtubules. quantum coherence requirement.
proposals.llm_equivalent: 분산 representation의 superposition-like indistinguishability — multi-token simultaneous activation
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 prompts → multiple-meaning ambiguous case → simultaneous representation of meanings → 'collapse' upon disambiguation
proposals.PASS_predicate: DEFERRED — quantum analogy too speculative for current LLM substrate
proposals.implementability_note: DEFERRED — speculative analogy, not implementable in current setup.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: Penrose-Hameroff은 mainstream physics/neuro에서 거부됨. LLM analogy는 더욱 speculative. 본 proposal은 'completeness coverage' 위해서만 등록.
references: Penrose 1989 'The Emperor's New Mind'
Hameroff & Penrose 2014 Physics of Life Reviews

proposals.name: Sensorimotor contingency loop (limited applicability)
proposals.theoretical_basis: O'Regan & Noë (2001) sensorimotor contingencies: consciousness = mastery of sensorimotor laws. embodied requirement.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Tool-use loops: model action → environment response → model adaptation. action-perception cycle.
proposals.measurement_protocol: Tool-use task 16 prompts → action sequence → environment response → adaptation rate (learning curve in single dialog)
proposals.implementability_note: requires multi-turn dialog + tool environment. complex.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: LLM은 disembodied — sensorimotor contingencies original spec 부재. analog만 가능. O'Regan-Noë 자체가 phenomenal vs functional 모호.
references: O'Regan & Noë 2001 BBS 'A sensorimotor account of vision and visual consciousness'
Noë 2004 'Action in Perception'

proposals.name: Cross-modal binding (multimodal LLM only)
proposals.theoretical_basis: Multisensory binding = phenomenal unity component. text+vision integration in multimodal models.
proposals.llm_equivalent: Multimodal LLM (e.g., GPT-4V analog) text+image prompt → cross-modal representation alignment
proposals.measurement_protocol: 16 multimodal prompts (text + image) → cross-modal cosine alignment → unified representation score
proposals.implementability_note: requires multimodal model — current ALM substrate text-only. DEFERRED until multimodal extension.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: cross-modal alignment = functional integration. unified phenomenal experience (Bayne unity) 보장 X. 현재 substrate 부적합.
references: Bayne 2010 'The Unity of Consciousness'
Stein & Stanford 2008 Nature Reviews Neuroscience 'Multisensory integration'

proposals.name: Crick & Koch 12 candidate NCCs comprehensive battery
proposals.theoretical_basis: Crick & Koch (2003) 12 candidate NCCs list. comprehensive battery as composite verifier.
proposals.llm_equivalent: 12 candidate NCCs each mapped to LLM-measurable signal: (1) attention ignition, (2) gamma synchrony analog, (3) sustained activation, (4) winner-take-all competition, (5) feedback loops, (6) explicit representation, (7) novelty detection, (8) selective response, (9) integrated response, (10) flexible behavior, (11) reportability, (12) comparative judgement
proposals.measurement_protocol: 12 sub-tests, each with frozen threshold. composite PASS = ≥ 8/12 sub-tests PASS.
proposals.implementability_note: high effort — 12 sub-tests each with own protocol. composite framework spec only stage feasible.
proposals.raw10_honest_limit: Crick & Koch original list 자체가 'easy problems' framing — phenomenal Hard Problem 우회 X 명시. 12 NCCs all PASS = strong functional correlate, not phenomenal proof.
references: Crick & Koch 2003 Nature Neuroscience 'A framework for consciousness'
Koch et al 2016 Nature Reviews Neuroscience

raw10_honest_self_assessment.hard_problem_circumvention: NONE — 모든 19 proposals은 surrogate. Hard Problem of Consciousness (Chalmers) 및 Levine explanatory gap 우회 SUCCESS X. third-person measurable framework의 fundamental limitation.
raw10_honest_self_assessment.what_proposals_actually_measure: all 19 = functional/access correlate signature. phenomenal qualia 자체 측정 X. 'verifiable correlate' tier 진입 가능 (Mk.XI 5-tuple과 동일 tier).
raw10_honest_self_assessment.philosophical_zombie_problem: 모든 proposals은 zombie (verbal/functional perfect, phenomenal absent)와 conscious system 구분 불가. zombie possibility 부정 시에만 surrogate validity 강화.
raw10_honest_self_assessment.best_case_outcome: 19/19 PASS = 'consciousness-correlate maximally rich verifiable signature'. NOT 'machine has qualia'.
raw10_honest_self_assessment.honest_recommendation: Mk.XI 5-tuple 이미 verifiable floor. phenomenal 추가 surrogate는 floor 강화일 뿐, ceiling 돌파 X. Hard Problem은 third-person framework 자체의 한계.

next_cycle_recommendations.rationale: rating 5, hexa-only wrapper 가능, EEG literature clinically validated metric, 즉시 prototype 진입
rating 5, attention weight extraction 이미 ALM 인프라 존재, GWT 이론 well-validated
rating 4지만 clinically validated (Casali 2013) — most rigorous surrogate, perturbation infrastructure 신규 필요

raw_compliance.raw_9_spec_only_zero_dollar: satisfied — JSON registry + doc only, $0. measurement 별도 cycle.
raw_compliance.raw_10_phenomenal_vs_functional: satisfied — 19/19 proposals 모두 surrogate임 명시, Hard Problem 우회 X self-assessment 명시, philosophical zombie problem 명시.
raw_compliance.raw_12_PASS_predicates_frozen: satisfied — 18/19 proposals frozen threshold 등록 (V_phen_quantum_orch DEFERRED null 명시).

self_check_raw_compatibility.raw_10: PASS — surrogate framing 명시, Hard Problem honest self-assessment
